snippet.title: Tony Kakkar - Tera Suit | Aly Goni & Jasmin Bhasin | Anshul Garg | Holi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg Presents Tera Suit by Hit Machine @Tony Kakkar starring Aly Gony & Jasmine Bhasin in the video. 

Singer - Tony Kakkar
Music - Tony Kakkar
Lyrics - Tony Kakkar


Featuring - Tony Kakkar, Aly Goni & Jasmin Bhasin
Producer - Anshul Garg

Video: Gurdas Media Works
Directors: Parth & Gurdas
Video Supervisor: Raghav Sharma
Dop: Shinda Singh
Project Manager: piyush Chandak
Ad: Navdeep & Sunny
Post Production: Gurdas Studios
Editing & Grading: Gobindpuriya
Gaffer: Sukhi & Gaurav
Line Prodution: Aman Film Production
Stylist - Outro by Akshita and Anulika
Art: Karma Arts
Choreographer: Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer: Robin
TonyŌĆÖs makeup- Rajan Passi
TonyŌĆÖs Hair - Harry 
Photoshoot: Jashan
Artwork: Vicky Sandhu

Distribution: Believe Digital
Promotions: Underdog Digital

Lyrics 
DUM DUM DUM DIGA DIGA ,DUM DUM DUM DIGA DIGA 
MAUSAM HAI BHEEGA BHEEGA ,MAUSAM BADA RIGHT
TERE SAATH MEIN LUKKA CHIPPI KHELUNGA 
DIN DHAL JAANE DO, AANE DENA NIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 

JADE SUIT MEIN BADE NAGINE BADE NAGINE YAAR HAIN
FAN TERA HARYANA U.P M.P AUR BIHAR HAI
JO BHI GORI BOLE HUMSAB KARNE KO TAIYYAR HAIN
HONTH SE HONTH MILA KE KARTI SEEDHA DIL PE WAAR HAI
TERE SAATH MEIN RANI HOLI KHELUNGA 
MAAROON PICHKARI HOKE LEFT HOKE RIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 

ISHQ SAMANDAR MAJE HAI DETA DOOBI DOOBI REHTI HAI
DOOB DOOB KE SEENE SEENE SATT SATT KE REHTI HAI
YAAR BADA MAJBOOT GHANA PAR TUJHPE POORA LATTUU HAI
TU BHI BILKUL KAM NAYI HAI AISI HAI THODI WAISI HAI 
TONY KAKKAR HOON MAIN RANI LUDO KHELUNGA 
DEKH JALDI MAT KARIYO MAANA TERI U.K DI FLIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA



#TonyKakkar #AlyGoni #JasminBhasin

snippet.title: Dhee ft. Arivu - Enjoy Enjaami (Prod. Santhosh Narayanan)
snippet.description:
Enjoy Enjaami  - Available now https://music.maajja.com/enjoyenjaami

Artist: Dhee ft. Arivu
Producer: Santhosh Narayanan
Director: Amith Krishnan (Studio MOCA)
Produced by: maajja 

Music video by Dhee and Arivu performing Enjoy Enjaami. (C) 2021 maajja inc.

Follow Dhee: https://www.instagram.com/dhee___
Follow Arivu: https://www.instagram.com/therukural
Follow Santhosh Narayanan: https://www.instagram.com/musicsanthosh
Follow maajja: https://www.instagram.com/joinmaajja
Follow Studio MOCA: https://www.instagram.com/moca.studio

Lyrics:
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thaatha thaatha kala vetti
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Pondhula yaaru meen koththi
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thanniyil odum thavalaikki
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Kambali poochi thangachi 

Allimalar kodi angadhame
Ottara ottara sandhaname
Mullai malar kodi muththaarame
Engooru engooru kuththaalame

Surukku paiyamma
Veththala mattaiyamma
Somandha kaiyamma
Maththalam kottuyamma
Thaaiyamma thaaiyamma
Enna panna maayamma 
Valliamma peraandi
Sangadhiya kellendi
Kannaadiya kaanaamdi 
Indhaarraa peraandi

Annakkili annakkili 
Adi aalamarakkela vannakkili
Nallapadi vaazhacholli 
Indha manna koduthaane
Poorvakudi
Kammaankara kaaniyellaam
Paadith thirinjaane
Aadhikkudi
Naayi nari 
Poonaikundhan
Indha erikkolam kooda sondhammadi 

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Muttaiya podum kozhikku 
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

Episode 3115: Bhogilal Enters Jethalal's Life Once Again
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder plays the call recording of the land deal to everyone present in the Gada household. While hearing this, Jethalal, Taarak, Sodhi and Bhide find out that the voice of the buyer is somewhat familiar. After investigating a little, they find out that it is indeed Bhogilal who has come into Jethalal's life once again, albeit as a buyer. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Shabd - A Women's Day Initiative from Truecaller - #ItsNotOK
snippet.description:
It's 2021, but that age-old problem named harassment still remains at large. 

In India alone, 1 woman falls victim to stalking every 55 minutes.

Sadly, this problem isn't addressed, not on prime time nor on any other avenue.

Here is a true story of a woman whoŌĆÖs actions spoke for society.

snippet.title: Office Panchayat I Girliyapa Spotlight
snippet.description:
Mr. Premchand has organized a meeting to address gender equality in the office. The only problem is that he has kept all the women employees out of this meeting. If that was not horrible enough, the ideas discussed in the meeting are highly questionable. Watch this video and find out if Mr. Premchand will succeed in making his office women-friendly.

Ungender is building gender-inclusive workplaces through corporate advisory, research, and technology. Visit https://www.ungender.in/ and join the journey of an inclusive world.

#Girliyapa #Ungender

snippet.title: Highlights - NorthEast United FC 1-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Semi-Final 2 (1st Leg) | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
The #HeroISL 2020-21 semi-finals picked up more steam as NorthEast United FC & ATK Mohun Bagan played out an entertaining 1-1 draw at the GMC Stadium in Bambolim. After a slow start, David Williams put the Mariners ahead in the 34th minute. Antonio Lopez Habas' side kept it tight at the back and looked to be heading for the win. But substitute Idrissa Sylla equalised in injury time to keep the Highlanders in the tie!

Enjoy the highlights of #NEUATKMB and tell us your favourite moment in the comments below.

ÓżżÓźŗ womenŌĆÖs week ÓżĢÓźć ÓżżÓż╣Óżż ÓżåÓż£ Óż╣Óż« Óż”ÓźćÓż¢ÓźćÓżéÓżŚÓźćÓżé @Let's LEARN ÓżĢÓźĆ founder Himanshi Singh  Óż£ÓźĆ ÓżĢÓźĆ motivational story Óźż Uttar Pradesh  ÓżĢÓźć ÓżøÓźŗÓż¤Óźć ÓżĖÓźć ÓżŚÓżŠÓżéÓżĄ Óż«ÓźćÓżé Óż£Óż©ÓźŹÓż«ÓźĆ Óż╣Óż┐Óż«ÓżŠÓżéÓżČÓźĆ ÓżĢÓźŗ Óż¼ÓżÜÓż¬Óż© ÓżĖÓźć Óż╣ÓźĆ teaching ÓżĢÓżŠ Óż¼Óż╣ÓźüÓżż ÓżČÓźīÓżĢ ÓżźÓżŠÓźż Óż”ÓżĖÓżĄÓźĆÓżé ÓżĢÓźć Óż¼ÓżŠÓż” ÓżēÓż©ÓźŹÓż╣ÓźŗÓżéÓż©Óźć UP board  ÓżøÓźŗÓź£ CBSE board Óż«ÓźćÓżé admission  Óż▓Óźć Óż▓Óż┐Óż»ÓżŠ Óż£Óż┐ÓżĖ ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓżŻ ÓżēÓż©ÓżĢÓźć Óż£ÓźĆÓżĄÓż© Óż«ÓźćÓżé ÓżĢÓżŠÓż½ÓźĆ difficulties ÓżöÓż░ challenges ÓżåÓż»Óźć , Óż¬Óż░ ÓżēÓż©ÓżĢÓźĆ Óż«ÓźćÓż╣Óż©Óżż ÓżöÓż░ will power ÓżĢÓźć ÓżåÓżŚÓźć ÓżĄÓźŗ ÓżĢÓż╣ÓżŠ Óż╣ÓźĆ Óż¤Óż┐ÓżĢ Óż¬ÓżŠÓżżÓźćÓźż ÓżĖÓźŹÓżĢÓźéÓż▓ ÓżĢÓźć Óż¼ÓżŠÓż” ÓżēÓż©ÓźŹÓż╣ÓźŗÓżéÓż©Óźć Óż”Óźŗ ÓżĖÓżŠÓż▓ ÓżĢÓżŠ diploma ÓżĢÓż░ÓżŠ ÓżöÓż░  Óż½Óż┐Óż░ CTET ÓżĢÓżŠ exam clear ÓżĢÓż░ÓżŠ.

Himanshi Singh or Himanshi mam is a very well-known name in the teaching world of YouTube. We are all familiar with her success, but today we will also take a look at the struggle and hard work hidden behind this success story.
So, under WomenŌĆÖs Week, Josh Talks has brought for you all the motivational story of @Let's LEARN  founder Himanshi Singh ji. 

Born in a small village of Uttar Pradesh, Himanshi was very fond of teaching since childhood. After her tenth standard, she shifted from UP board and took admission in the CBSE board, due to which many difficulties and challenges came her way, but in front of her hard work and will power, they could not stand. After completing her high school, she did a two-year diploma and then cleared the CTET exam. She gave every test of her life with full courage and honesty. Regardless of the difficult circumstances, she faced them by being strong and that is why she is so successful today and is an inspiration to millions of children. Today she is not only a teacher but is also the author of many books.
She wants to tell the children that, it does not matter where have you come from, the only thing that matters is that how much fire is there in you to get success because every problem and difficulty of life can be overcome by being strong. Also, one should never stop learning.

You can follow Himanshi Mam on various social media handles:

Instagram: himanshisinghofficial 
Twitter: @himanshiiisingh
LetŌĆÖs LEARN: https://www.youtube.com/c/LetsLEARN2016/featured


#JoshTalksHindi #WomensWeek #HimanshiSingh

Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, womenŌĆÖs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life.

Himanshi Singh or Himanshi mam is a very well-known name in the teaching world of YouTube. We are all familiar with her success, but today we will also take a look at the struggle and hard work hidden behind this success story.
So, under WomenŌĆÖs Week, Josh Talks has brought for you all the motivational story of @Let's LEARN  founder Himanshi Singh ji. 

Born in a small village of Uttar Pradesh, Himanshi was very fond of teaching since childhood. After her tenth standard, she shifted from UP board and took admission in the CBSE board, due to which many difficulties and challenges came her way, but in front of her hard work and will power, they could not stand. After completing her high school, she did a two-year diploma and then cleared the CTET exam. She gave every test of her life with full courage and honesty. Regardless of the difficult circumstances, she faced them by being strong and that is why she is so successful today and is an inspiration to millions of children. Today she is not only a teacher but is also the author of many books.
She wants to tell the children that, it does not matter where have you come from, the only thing that matters is that how much fire is there in you to get success because every problem and difficulty of life can be overcome by being strong. Also, one should never stop learning.

You can follow Himanshi Mam on various social media handles:

Instagram: himanshisinghofficial 
Twitter: @himanshiiisingh
LetŌĆÖs LEARN: https://www.youtube.com/c/LetsLEARN2016/featured


#JoshTalksHindi #WomensWeek #HimanshiSingh

Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, womenŌĆÖs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life.

Episode 3062: Will The Truth Be Out?
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dr Haathi tells that he has gotten his special glasses and stethoscope which will allow them to know the truth. After checking Taarak, he tells everyone that it is not Taarak who had the pizza. All this while, Goli looks worried. As the confusion around Taarak and his diet are clear, everyone decides to go home when they are stopped by Dr Haathi as he tells them that he will check everybody.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Episode 3062: Will The Truth Be Out?
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dr Haathi tells that he has gotten his special glasses and stethoscope which will allow them to know the truth. After checking Taarak, he tells everyone that it is not Taarak who had the pizza. All this while, Goli looks worried. As the confusion around Taarak and his diet are clear, everyone decides to go home when they are stopped by Dr Haathi as he tells them that he will check everybody.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Paatashaala -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar|Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash|Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Nenjam Marappathillai Public Reviews | Nenjam Marappathillai Theatre Response 

Nenjam Marappathillai is an Indian Tamil-language horror film written and directed by Selvaraghavan. Jointly produced by Escape Artists Motion Pictures, Southside Studios and GLO Studios, the film features S. J. Suryah, Regina Cassandra and Nandita Swetha. Yuvan Shankar Raja composed the film score and soundtrack, with cinematography and editing were handled respectively by Arvind Krishna and Prasanna GK.

Episode 3116: Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and everyone from Gokuldham have made a plan to catch Bhogilal and get Jethalal's 50 lakh rupees back from him. Jethalal asks Taarak to be with Champaklal while the time of the deal as an accountant and everyone else will hide in the other room. Sundar calls Bhogilal and asks him to come to the party's house to complete the deal. Bhogilal agrees to come to the party's house.  Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful? To know, watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: #WomenWill - A #GoogleforIndia Event
snippet.description: On International Women's Day, 8th Mar 2021 at 10.30am IST, please join us at #WomenWill - A Google for India Event livestream where Sundar Pichai, CEO, Google and Alphabet, Ratan Tata, Chairman, Tata Trusts, Phumzile Mlambo-Ngcuka, Executive Director, UN Women, Smriti Zubin Irani, Minister of Women and Child Development, Government of India, and many of our leaders share their vision for solving for gender equity so women can benefit from the opportunities of the digital economy.

snippet.title: Clash-A-Rama! Clash Royale 5th Anniversary Awards!
snippet.description:
#clasharama #clashroyale #birthday

The Clash Royale Arena has been turned into a glamorous award show to celebrate the 5th Anniversary!
Who will be Crowned the best Team? Red or BlueŌĆ”

Thank you to all of our players for the journey so far!
See you in the Arena!

Subscribe for more! Ō¢║Ō¢║ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

FEATURES
ŌĆó Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
ŌĆó Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
ŌĆó Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
ŌĆó Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
ŌĆó Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
ŌĆó Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
ŌĆó Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
ŌĆó Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
ŌĆó Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
ŌĆó Play new events every week
ŌĆó Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale
SUPERCELLŌäó and CLASH ROYALEŌäó are trademarks of Supercell Oy

snippet.title: EXAMS Ke Pehle Ye Jarur Karna - Pre Exam Meditation and Breathing Technique - AMF Ep 2
snippet.description:
Did you know that Mindful Meditation before an exam is very beneficial for recalling of information? 

We discussed an easy breath focus trick in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by FactTechz a.k.a Rajesh Kumar, where we explore different amazing facts related to science, astronomy, finance, technology and various general facts. This is the episode 2 of AMF.

snippet.title: Bina Padhe Jaa | Stand up Comedy | Amit Tandon
snippet.description:
To play a good 'good cop' I accidentally told my son 'Bina Padhe Ja' a night before his exams. But I highly recommend that you guys don't do it. 

Be a good 'good cop' by downloading the Free Maths Exam Prep Kit for your child from The Countingwell App by @countingwell

Google Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cwapp  

Apple App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/countingwell/id1508540117

snippet.title: Pareidolia Ka BHOOT - What Exactly is Pareidolia According to Science - AMF Ep 1
snippet.description:
What does science say about Pareidolia? The tendency for incorrect perception of an object, pattern or meaning known to the observer?

We see some example of this, in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by FactTechz a.k.a Rajesh Kumar, where we explore different amazing facts related to science, astronomy, finance, technology and various general facts. This is the episode 1 of AMF.

snippet.description:

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Dooriyan sung by the youth sensation Raghav Chaitanya and the music video stars Shivin Narang and Apoorva Arora. This song has been finely composed by Anurag Saikia & written by Kunaal Vermaa. The video has been directed by Karan Anshuman who narrates a gripping story, where Shivin and Apoorva portray an estranged couple who later realise the true value of love. The story unfolds intense situations and memories of their past.

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyŌĆÖs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates FarhadŌĆÖs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiŌĆÖs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
